hub: ^Woop! Welcome! This is a group conversation test. Let me introduce you to my colleague.
group_meeting: ^Agent, meet my colleague from the back office. BACK
colleague_introduction: ^Nice to meet you! I'm the lead technician here. FRONT.
player_question: ^What kind of work do you both do here?
front_npc_explains: ^Well, I handle the front desk operations and guest interactions. But my colleague here...
colleague_responds: ^I manage all the backend systems and security infrastructure. Together, we keep everything running smoothly.
front_npc_agrees: ^It really is! We've been working together for several years now. Communication is key.
colleague_adds: ^Exactly. And we're always looking for talented people like you to join our team.

c-0: ^Excellent! Welcome aboard. We'll get you set up with everything you need.
